summary: Backend testing completed for Manual Campaign Pending Status Fix. All 9 key assertions pass: (1) messages_sent has status='pending' for manual mode, (2) sent_at is NOT set initially, (3) queued_at is set, (4) last_sent_at is NOT set for manual mode, (5) Campaign Journey API returns 'pending_send', (6) Task is created with status='pending' and completed=false, (7) After task completion, messages_sent.status updates to 'sent', (8) sent_at is set after completion, (9) Journey shows 'sent' after completion. Also verified automated campaigns still work correctly with immediate status='sent' and last_sent_at set.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py lines 591-670: Correctly distinguishes manual vs automated - manual gets status='pending' and queued_at, automated gets status='sent' and sent_at
scheduler.py lines 644-645, 660-661: last_sent_at only set for automated mode (not is_manual)
tasks.py lines 536-559: Task completion correctly updates enrollment messages_sent from status='pending' to status='sent' with sent_at timestamp
contacts.py lines 1347-1356: Campaign Journey API correctly maps status='pending' to 'pending_send' for frontend display
CampaignJourney.tsx: Frontend correctly handles 'pending_send' status with 'Ready to Send' label and orange styling
seed_data_creation: TEST_Pending_Status_Direct campaign and contact created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The manual campaign pending status fix has been verified working. Key behavior: For MANUAL delivery_mode campaigns, the scheduler now creates messages_sent entries with status='pending' and queued_at instead of status='sent' and sent_at. The last_sent_at field is NOT set at enrollment level for manual mode. When user completes the campaign_send task via PATCH /api/tasks/{user_id}/{task_id}, the enrollment's messages_sent entry is updated to status='sent'. The Campaign Journey endpoint (/api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/campaign-journey) returns 'pending_send' status for pending manual steps, which the frontend displays as 'Ready to Send'.

features_tested.scheduler_trigger: POST /api/campaigns/scheduler/trigger - correctly processes manual campaigns with pending status
features_tested.campaign_journey: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/campaign-journey - returns 'pending_send' for pending manual steps
features_tested.task_completion: PATCH /api/tasks/{user_id}/{task_id} with action=complete - updates enrollment messages_sent from pending to sent
features_tested.enrollment_structure: messages_sent entries have correct status/queued_at/sent_at fields based on delivery_mode
features_tested.last_sent_at: Only set for automated mode, not manual mode
features_tested.automated_comparison: Automated campaigns still work correctly with immediate status='sent'

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS functionality - SMS not actually sent

bug_fix_verified.original_issue: For manual campaigns, step 1 showed as 'sent' in Campaign Journey even though user hadn't manually sent it yet
bug_fix_verified.root_cause: Scheduler was setting messages_sent with sent_at and status implied as 'sent', and setting last_sent_at on enrollment for manual mode
fix_applied: messages_sent entries now have explicit status field: 'pending' for manual, 'sent' for automated
Manual mode uses queued_at instead of sent_at
last_sent_at is only set for automated mode
Task completion updates messages_sent from pending to sent
Campaign Journey endpoint checks status field to return 'pending_send' vs 'sent'
